message:
Fix audit redaction vulnerabilities and consolidation

- Fixed critical redaction bug where numeric sensitive fields (like phone numbers, SSNs, credit cards passed as numbers) were bypassing masking and hashing in 'audit-redaction.service.ts'.
- Added regression test for numeric redaction in 'audit-redaction.test.ts'.
- Refactored 'logging.middleware.ts' to use the robust 'audit-redaction.service.ts' instead of the legacy 'utils/redaction.ts', ensuring consistent redaction policies across the application.
- Updated 'audit.ts' service to redact event metadata before logging to prevent secrets from leaking into application logs.
